Dragon Form.Description: Tyrustis becomes a dragon of volatile Lithium, stripping the identity out of everyone around her and imposing laws of physics that change moment to moment.

Void.Description: Tyrustis' will is absolute but erratic, causing reality to bend to her whims. Enemies within a certain radius are disoriented and have their attributes randomly modified.

Enforcer.Description: Tyrustis' sheer stubbornness allows her to enforce brutal work quotas and mentally break the spirit of resistance in subjugated species. Enemies within a certain radius have their morale reduced.
